title: Class VI bulk freighter

The '''Class VI bulk freighter''' was a type of cargo hauler built by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]], considered antiquated by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was developed from the earlier [[Praetorian-class frigate|''Praetorian''-class frigate]].<ref name="kotorcg">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Characteristics==
The Class VI was 180 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length and had a cargo capacity of 2,000 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] and a Class 3 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. In standard operation, it could carry a crew of four, with provision for two passengers and supplies for six [[Standard month/Legends|months]], but at a minimum, it could operate with just a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and navigator.

Slow and very sluggish at sublight speeds, a standard Class VI lacked a backup [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and was armed with a single turret-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]].

==History==
The Class VI was built on the same hullform as the ''Praetorian''-class frigate,<ref name="kotorcg" /> a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] in the Republic fleet which served at least as early as the [[Battle of Koros Major]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

Thousands of years later, a ship of the same class was launched in around [[70 BBY/Legends|70 BBY]], called the ''[[Hearst]]'', and was used as the headquarters of the independent newsfeed [[Freedom Galactic News]].<ref name="cb">{{CasusBelliCite|89|La Nouvelle République : Une autre époque pour Star Wars}}</ref> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] also had at least one such vessel in its forces.<ref name="reb2">[[Rebellion 2|''Rebellion'' 2]]</ref>

During the initial stages of the [[Thrawn campaign]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] used an old freighter of this class as part of a ploy to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], simulating a routine stop-and-search maneuver with [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] and an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]].<ref name="htte3">[[Heir to the Empire 3|''Heir to the Empire'' 3]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The name and statistics of this class derive from the entry for the ''Hearst'' in the [[Casus Belli 89|October/November 1995]] issue of the French RPG journal [[Casus Belli (magazine)|''Casus Belli'']], where that ship is identified as a ''cargo classe VI''. The illustration of ''Hearst'' is by [[Fred Blanchard]], artist on the [[Star Wars: Heir to the Empire (comic series)|''Heir to the Empire'' comic adaptation]], and it clearly represents a variant of the same freighter type that would appear a few months later in December 1995's [[Heir to the Empire 3|issue 3]]; alongside ''Hearst'', this issue of ''Casus Belli'' also presents the ''[[Black Lotus]]'', a [[A-class bulk freighter|PCL 27]] freighter like the ship used by Thrawn in the [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]] ambush in [[Heir to the Empire 6|issue 6]].

However, it should be mentioned that an earlier illustration of the ambush of Luke's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] in ''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' shows a different freighter design—and it seems that the comic artists were aware of this image, inasmuch as they copied the distinctive twin-well interdictor from it.

[[File:Variant_freighter.jpg|thumb|right|180px|A different image purporting to show the freighter used during [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] campaign.]]

Adding to the confusion, the most recent appearance of the Class VI shows it serving as a combat warship several millennia earlier. The disparity between the two roles was resolved by the ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' which explained that the Class VI freighter was a reuse of the hullform of the earlier ''Praetorian''-class frigate.<ref name="kotorcg" />
